question: Will Brad Lander win the NY10 Democratic House Primary?
reason: Recent polls and endorsements indicate Lander's strong lead over Goldman in the NY-10 Democratic primary.
evidence: An Emerson College Polling/PIX11 survey from May 21, 2026, shows Lander leading Goldman 57% to 23% among likely Democratic primary voters in the 10th District. ([politicsny.com](https://politicsny.com/2026/05/21/poll-on-ny-10-congress-primary-has-lander-leading-goldman-by-wide-margin-other-nyc-house-races-tight/?utm_source=openai))

Prediction markets, such as Polymarket, reflect an 82% implied probability of Lander winning the primary. ([predictionedge.com](https://www.predictionedge.com/elections/us-house/new-york-district-10-democratic-primary/?utm_source=openai))

Lander has secured endorsements from prominent figures like Senator Bernie Sanders and Mayor Zohran Mamdani, bolstering his campaign. ([notus.org](https://www.notus.org/2026-election/bernie-sanders-backs-brad-lander-primary-challenge-dan-goldman?utm_source=openai))
